name: Apple Upside Down Cake
instructions: Preheat oven to 350°. Grease a 9' round cake pan
In a saucepan, stir in caramel ingredients and heat over medium heat for 3 minutes. Pour into baking pan.
Cook apples, butter, and salt in a skillet until tender, about 10 minutes. Arrange cooled apples over caramel starting in the center and working out.
In a seperate bowl beat butter and add sugar slowly.
Beat in vanilla and eggs. Add dry ingredients in 3 parts, alternating with milk. Spread batter over apples.
Tap pan twice on counter and bake for 40 minutes. Cool for 20 minutes before running sharp knife around sides and removing cake to a platter. Let cool.

name: Asian Noodles

items.text: 1/2 cup coconut milk or sour cream
items.name: coconut milk or sour cream

items.text: 1 cup seedless cucumber, sliced and quartered
items.name: seedless cucumber, sliced and quartered

items.text: 2 green onions, chopped (use both white and green parts)
items.name: green onions, chopped
items.notes: use both white and green parts

items.text: 1/4 cup finely diced red bell pepper
items.name: finely diced red bell pepper

instructions: Place all sauce ingredients in a blender; blend on medium-high until smooth. Cover and refrigerate sauce until needed.

Cook pasta according to package directions; drain. Transfer cooked pasta to a large bowl, add cold water to cover pasta and let chill approximately 5 minutes or until pasta is no longer warm to the touch.
Drain pasta; add sauce to the bowl and stir to thoroughly coat pasta. (If sauce seems too thick, add 2 tablespoons water and mix well.)
Divide pasta into individual servings and garnish each with cucumber, green onion and red pepper.

name: Balsamic Chicken and Peppers
description: I like using a colorful blend of peppers to brighten this skillet specialty-and a little balsamic vinegar to flavor the tender chicken. If you prefer a stronger flavor, add a little more! Author: Valerie Moore. Stilwell, Kansas.

items.text: 4 boneless skinless chicken breast halves(4 ounces each)
items.name: boneless skinless chicken breast halves

items.text: 1 each medium sweet yellow red and orange peppers, julienned
items.name: each medium sweet yellow red and orange peppers, julienned

instructions: Sprinkle chicken with pepper and salt. In a large skillet, cook the chicken in 1 tablespoon oil for 4-6 minutes in each side or until a meat thermometer reach's 170; drain. Remove chicken and keep warm
In the same skillet, sautÃ© peppers and onion in remaining oil for 3-4 minutes or until tender. Return chicken to the pan. Add vinegar; heat through.

name: Bark

items.text: 1/2 lb creamy peanut butter chocolate for striping
items.name: creamy peanut butter chocolate for striping

instructions: Melt chocolate in microwave or double broiler. Add other ingredients. Cool until firm. Cut into bars

name: Berry Cheesecake Tart
instructions: Preheat oven to 375Â°. Place all crust ingredients in food processor and pulse; add up to 2 T cold water until dough forms.
Form dough into a disk and wrap in plastic; refrigerate 20 minutes. Press dough into bottom and up sides of a 9' tart pan, line with foil, and add pie weights.
Bake 20 minutes, .move foil and weights, and continue baking 15 minutes.
Whisk first 4 filling ingredients in a saucepan over medium heat until it thickens. Remove from heat; whisk in the rest until creamy.
Pour into cooled crust and refrigerate 2 hours. Toss sugar and berries; let stand 10 minutes and top cheesecake.

name: Curried Turkey Vegetable Soup
description: Chock-full or veggies, this aromatic soup has just the right hint of curry. It's a delicious way to use up leftover turkey. - Virginia Anthony. Jacksonville, Florida.

items.text: 1 package (9 ounces)fresh baby spinach, coarsely chopped
items.name: package fresh baby spinach, coarsely chopped

instructions: In a Dutch oven, sautÃ© onions in oil until tender. Stir in flour and curry until blended. Gradually stir in broth. Add the potatoes, celery, carrots, parsley, and sage. Bring to a boil. Reduce heat; cover and simmer for 10-12 minutes or until vegetables are tender.
Stir in the turkey, half-and-half, spinach, salt and pepper. cook and stir until spinach is wilted and soup is heated through.

name: Cheesy Vegetable Soup
source: Soups and Stews Better homes and gardens win money for recipes (1989)
description: Start with a can of potato soup to make this terrific quick- fix vegetable soup - LaNae Minton, Cheyenne, Wyo

items.text: 1 cup frozen loose-pack whole kernel corn
items.name: frozen loose-pack whole kernel corn

items.text: 1 10 3/4-oz can condensed cream of potato soup
items.name: 10 3/4-oz can condensed cream of potato soup

instructions: In a medium saucepan cook onion in hot butter till tender but not brown. Add corn, broccoli, carrot, and water. Bring to boiling; reduce heat.

Cover and simmer for 10 minutes or till vegetables are tender. Stir in soup, milk, cheeses, and pepper. Cook and stir over medium heat till cheese is melted and mixture is heated though, Makes 4 side-dish servings.

name: Veggie-Topped Tilapia
description: I invented this fast weeknight dish using frozen tilapia fillets. My entire family loved it! I often serve it with crusty rolls, salad and a rice dish ... and it always gets raves! - CHRISTINE BISSONETTE. SCOTIA, NEW YORK

items.text: 1/3 cup white wine or reduced- sodium chicken broth
items.name: white wine or reduced- sodium chicken broth

instructions: Place fillets in a 13-in. x 9-in. baking dish coated with cooking spray. Drizzle with wine or broth; sprinkle with seafood seasoning. Combine the onion, green pepper, tomato, lemon juice, oil and garlic powder; spoon over fillets.
Cover and bake at 425Â° for 15 minutes. Uncover; sprinkle with Parmesan cheese. Bake 5-10 minutes longer or until vegetables are tender and fish flakes easily with a fork.

name: Chunky Potato Soup
description:
A piping-hot bowl of this hearty soup can chase away the chills on cold day
Grandma's Secrets
To make this a filling meal, Grandma usually served this soup with fresh bread. For a slightly different twist, serve it in individual bread bowls. To make them, buy small. round loaves of a hearty bread, such as Italian, and slice off a small piece from the top. Then remove the inside of the loaf. leaving a 1A-inch shell; fill with hot soup.
instructions: Peel potatoes and cut into 1-inch cubes
Bring water to a boil in large saucepan. Add potatoes and cook until tender. Drain, reserving liquid. Set aside potatoes. Measure 1 cup cooking liquid, adding water, if necessary; set aside.
Peel and finely chop onion. Melt butter in saucepan over medium heat. Add onion to saucepan; cook, stirring frequently, until onion is translucent and tender, but not brown.

Gradually add potatoes, reserved 1 cup cooking liquid, milk and sugar to onion mixture in saucepan; stir well. Add cheese and ham. Simmer over low heat 30 minutes, stirring frequently. Store leftovers, covered, in refrigerator.

name: Alfalfa Sprout Salad
instructions: Place all ingredients except pita rounds in a bowl; toss.
Cut each pita in half, open halves and fill halves with mixture.

name: Andouille and Chicken Jambalaya

items.text: 1 pound andouille, chorizo, or other smoked sausage, cut crosswise into 1/4-inch slice
items.name: pound andouille, chorizo, or other smoked sausage, cut crosswise into 1/4-inch slice

items.text: 1 1/2 pounds boneless white and dark chicken meat, cut into 1-inch cubes
items.name: 1/2 pounds boneless white and dark chicken meat, cut into 1-inch cubes

instructions: Heat the oil in a large cast-iron Dutch oven over medium heat. Add the onions, bell peppers, 2 teaspoons of the salt, and 1 teaspoon of the cayenne. Stirring often, brÃ³wn the vegetables for about 20 minutes, or until they are caramelized and dark brown in color. Scrape the bottom and sides of the pot to loosen any browned particles.
Add the sausage and cook, stirring often for 10 to 15 minutes, scraping the bottom and sides of the pot to loosen any browned particles.

Season the chicken with the remaining 1 teaspoon salt and remaining 1/4 teaspoon cayenne. Add the chicken and the bay leaves to the pot. Brown the chicken for 8 to 10 minutes, scraping the bottom of the pot to loosen any browned particles.

Add the rice and stir for 2 to 3 minutes to coat it evenly. Add the water, stir to combine, and cover. Cook over medium heat for 30 to 35 minutes, without stirring, or until the rice is tender and the liquid has been absorbed.
Remove the pot from the heat and let stand, covered, for 2 to 3 minutes. Remove the bay leaves. Stir in the green onions and serve.

name: Au Gratin Potatoes

items.text: 1 sprig rosemary, chopped, plus more for garnish
items.name: sprig rosemary, chopped, plus more for garnish

instructions: Preheat the oven to 350Â° F.
Place the onions and the butter in the Wonder Cooker's Grill Pan, place on the stove top, and sweat the onions over low heat for about 10 mins.
Using a mandolin, slice the potatoes into 1/8-in. rounds.
Whisk together the cream, mustard, salt, ground black pepper, and rosemary in a bowl to make the cream mixture.
Shingle half the potatoes over the onions
Place 6 Swiss cheese slices over the potatoes.
Shingle the remaining potatoes over the cheese.
Carefully pour the cream mixture over the top layer of potatoes.
Slice the remaining Swiss cheese into squares and scatter evenly over the top.
Garnish with a sprig of rosemary.
Bake in the oven at 350Â° F until golden brown (about 45 mins.).

name: Oven Baked Potato Chips
instructions: Preheat oven to 350Â°F. Spray a cookie sheet with non-stick spray.
In a small bowl, mix cheese, salt and garlic.
Slice potatoes thinly and place in a layer on the cookie sheet. Sprinkle both sides with the cheese mix.
Bake 10 to 13 minutes. Serves 4.

name: Banana Bread
instructions: Pre heat to 350. In one bowl mix dry ingredients except sugar.
In second bowl cream sugar, butter, and bananas.
Mix together the milk and vinegar and gradually add to the banana mixture, alternating with the dry ingredients, mix well. Optional - add walnuts or chocolate chips
Pour into greased loaf pan. Bake for 45 minutes or until tooth pick comes out clean.
Cool 15 - 20 minutes, Turn upside down onto plate, then flip over to cool.

name: Barbecue Beef Sandwiches
instructions: In a large nonstick skillet, cook thebeef, celery and onion over medium heat until meat is no longer pink; drain.

Stir in the tomato sauce, ketchup, brown sugar, barbecue sauce, mustard and Worcestershire sauce. Bring to a boil. Reduce heat; simmer, uncovered, for 10-15 minutes to allow flavors to blend. Spoon 3/4 cup onto each bun.

name: Bean 'n' Rice Burritos

items.text: 1 can (15 ounces) black beans, rinsed and drained
items.name: can black beans, rinsed and drained

items.text: Reduced-fat shredded cheddar cheese and reduced-fat sour cream, optional
items.name: Reduced-fat shredded cheddar cheese and reduced-fat sour cream, optional

instructions: In a small saucepan, bring water to a boil. Add rice. Return to a boil. Reduce heat; cover and simmer for 5 minutes. Remove from the heat. Let stand for 5 minutes or until water is absorbed.

Meanwhile, in a large skillet, saute the green pepper, onion and garlic in oil for 3-4 minutes or until tender. Stir in the chili powder, cumin and pepper flakes until combined. Add beans and rice; cook and stir for 4-6 minutes or until heated through.
Spoon about 1/2 cup of filling off-center on each tortilla; top with 2 tablespoons salsa. Fold sides and ends over filling and roll up. Serve with cheese and sour cream if desired.

name: Beef Boulettes with Garlic
instructions: Put the beef in a mixing bowl. Add 1 1/2 tsp of the salt, 1/2 tsp of the black pepper, the cayenne and the chopped onions. Mix well with your hands.
Make 12 meatballs. Insert a clove of garlic in the center of each and pinch the beef around it.
Combine the flour with rub in a shallow plate. Roll the meatballs evenly in the flour mixture. Reserve any excess flour.
Heat the oil in a large sauce pan over high heat. Add the meatball and brown evenly, using a spoon to turn them. With a slotted spoon, remove the meatballs and set aside.
Reduce heat to medium and add the reserved flour mixture. Stir constantly for 3-4 minutes, make a dark brown roux.
Add the sliced onions, bay leaves, and the remaining salt and pepper. Cook stirring occasionally for 10 minutes or until onions are very soft.
Add the water and mix well. Bring to a boil and return meatballs to pot. Reduce heat and simmer, uncovered for 1 hour. Skin fat. Remove bay leaves add parsley and serve immediately.

name: Beef Stroganoff

items.text: 1 can cream of mushroom or chicken soup
items.name: can cream of mushroom or chicken soup

instructions: Brown the hamburger with the onion.
Add the cream of mushroom or chicken soup and simmer for 3 minutes.
Pour in the sour cream and be careful not to boil it.
Serve over rice.

name: Black Bean Asperagus Salad

items.text: 2 pounds fresh asparagus, trimmed and cut into 1-inch pieces
items.name: pounds fresh asparagus, trimmed and cut into 1-inch pieces

items.text: 2 cans (15 ounces each) black beans, rinsed and drained
items.name: cans black beans, rinsed and drained

instructions: In a Dutch oven, bring 1 in. of water to a boil. Add asparagus; cover and boil for 3-4 minutes or until crisp-tender. Drain and immediately place asparagus in ice water. Drain and pat dry.

In a large serving bowl, combine the asparagus, beans, red pepper, onion and parsley. In a small bowl, whisk the oil, lime juice, salt and pepper. Pour over vegetables and toss to coat. Cover and refrigerate for at least 2 hours before serving.

name: Black Bean Salad

items.text: 1 cans black beans, drained and rinsed
items.name: cans black beans, drained and rinsed

instructions: Mix all ingredients in a large bowl. Salt and pepper to taste

name: Blond Brownies
description: This recipe was given to me by my neighbor
instructions: Pre heat to 350. Mix 1 egg, margarine, and yellow cake mix. Pour into 9 x 13 pan
Beat cream cheese, powered sugar, and the remaining 3 eggs. Pour on top of crust.
Bake for 40 minutes

name: Broiled Orange Roughy

items.text: 1 can (2-1/4 ounces) sliced ripe olives, drained
items.name: can sliced ripe olives, drained

instructions: 1. In a small bowl, combine the oil, lemon juice and seasoning blend; spoon over the fish.
Broil 4-5 in. from the heat for 10-15 minutes or until fish flakes easily with a fork.
Meanwhile, in a small bowl, combine the salsa ingredients; serve with fish.

name: Broccoli Waldorf Salad
description: This salad is as easy to pre-pare as it is to eat! A color-ful combination of apples, raisins and pecans jazzes up broccoli florets in this sum-mery side dish. Its tangy-sweet flavor makes it astandout at company picnics and church potlucks. -Vicki Roehrick Chubbuck, Idaho
instructions: In a large serving bowl, combine the first four ingredients. Drizzle with dressing; toss to coat. Refrigerate leftovers. Yield:

name: Brussel Sprouts with Water Chestnuts

items.text: Dash each pepper and ground nutmeg
items.name: pepper and ground nutmeg

instructions: 1. In a small bowl, combine the oil, lemon juice and seasoning blend; spoon over the fish.
Broil 4-5 in. from the heat for 10-15 minutes or until fish flakes easily with a fork.
Meanwhile, in a small bowl, combine the salsa ingredients; serve with fish.
